channel.title: Fireblocks Office Ticker — Crypto News
channel.description: Curated crypto news headlines. Refreshed every 30 min.

item.title: Bitcoin hits 6-week low as U.S.-Iran strikes roil global markets
BlackRock's IBIT sees $528M outflow, second-largest daily withdrawal on record
Samsung units to take $408M stake in South Korea's largest crypto exchange
CFTC seeks to reverse prior settlement deal with crypto exchange Gemini
White House reviews CFTC prediction-market rule; Trump backs federal oversight
BIS Project Agorá demonstrates tokenized cross-border payments settling in seconds
Chainalysis report finds crypto firms tightening compliance, but gaps remain
Ether falls below $2,000 even as ETH futures open interest hits record 16M
Polymarket says KYC requirements limited to beta product, not main platform
Most Bitcoin CME gaps near resolution; three remain unfilled
